title: Equinix and PGIM Real Estate Open First xScale™ Data Center in Sydney for Hyperscalers
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif. , June 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company™, and PGIM Real Estate, the real estate investment and financing arm of PGIM, Prudential Financial's* global asset management business, today announced the opening of the first xScale data center in Sydney, named SY9x.
